title: Status
description:
You can use this function block to show user-defined status texts and symbols in the User Interface
In addition, this can be used for decision logic.
Double-click on the program block to open the editing window.

outputs.description: The current status text resulting from the conditions specified in the editing window of the block.
The current status value resulting from the conditions specified in the editing window of the block.
Intelligent API based connector. API Commands
